mapEditor.title: Map Editor
mapEditor.description: Browse the game world rendered from your client's minimap data

clientPath.placeholder: Path to your 3.3.5 client folder (or its Data folder)

scene.controls: WASD/arrows: move · Space/C: up/down · Shift: fast · Left-drag: pan · Right-drag: look · Right-click: position

spawns.toggleHint: Show creature spawns as models around the camera
spawns.noMapId: This map has no Map.dbc id, so database spawns can't be linked
spawns.moveHint: Right-click a spot on the terrain to move this spawn.

states.noClient: Set the WoW client folder in Settings to browse its maps.
